'''Huf duns''' were large herd animals native to [[Talus/Legends|Talus]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. These herbivorous creatures were relatively peaceful, often ignoring smaller creatures that roamed around them. Only a few people ever managed to successfully domesticate or even capture Huf duns.<ref name="SWG:HD" />
